name: EthSetVerbosity
title: EthSetVerbosity
tables: This function set the verbosity level of the Ethernet IL. The default setting is that only error messages are written to the Write Window of CANoe.
verbosity verbosity level 0: do not write messages to the Write Window 1: write only error messages (default) 2: write warning and error messages 3: write information, warning and error messages
Example // do not print Ethernet IL messages to Write WindowEthSetVerbosity( 0 );
